## Epic summary
Describe the epic goal and expected outcome.

## Business value
Why is this epic important?

## Tasks
- [ ] Task 1
- [ ] Task 2
- [ ] Task 3

## Dependencies
- [ ] Frontend build completed before backend work
- [ ] Design handoff confirmed in `DESIGN_HANDOFF.md`

## Notes
- Use `EPICS_TASKS.md` for the prioritized epic/task order.
- Keep the epic aligned with the current front-end first priority.
